name: Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease an 8 x 13-inch baking pan.
Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
Add the eggs, beating well after each addition.
Mix in the dry ingredients alternately with the mashed bananas, stirring gently to combine.
Stir in the lemon extract and vanilla extract.
Fold in the chopped nuts.
Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
While still warm, frost the bars with a thin layer of powdered sugar frosting.
Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars or squares.
Variation: For Banana Drop Cookies, drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets and bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 350 degrees.
Makes 4 dozen.
